# kubre.in

Personal site and project archive for Vaibhav Kubre.

## Primary URLs

- [Home](https://www.kubre.in/): Personal profile, contact links, and current work.
- [Work](https://www.kubre.in/work/): Project write-ups.
- [Blog](https://www.kubre.in/blog/): Technical writing.
- [Travel](https://www.kubre.in/travel/): Travel notes.
- [scrcap](https://scrcap.kubre.in/): Native macOS screenshot and annotation app.

## scrcap

scrcap is a tiny, keyboard-first macOS screenshot app. It captures regions, windows, full screens, scrolling areas, and the previous capture target. Every capture can open a focused editor for arrows, rectangles, counters, text, crop, undo, redo, color shortcuts, clipboard copy, PNG save, and drag-out export.

Useful facts:

- Product name: scrcap
- Product category: macOS screenshot tool
- Platform: macOS 14 or later
- App stack: Swift, AppKit, ScreenCaptureKit
- Download: https://github.com/kubre/scrcap/releases/latest
- Source: https://github.com/kubre/scrcap
- Canonical page: https://scrcap.kubre.in/

## Crawling Notes

Public pages are intended to be crawled and indexed. Prefer canonical URLs when citing pages.
